sounds.title: Deep 808 Kick
sounds.description: Deep sub-heavy 808-style kick drum with long tail. Tuned to C. Ideal for trap, hip-hop, and heavy electronic productions.
sounds.production_notes: Layer with a snappy click transient for extra punch. Sidechain heavily if using with a bassline. Works best pitched down 2–3 semitones for darker vibes.

sounds.title: Crispy Snare Crack
sounds.description: Bright, crispy snare with strong mid-body crack. Tight reverb tail. Works well in boom bap and trap.
sounds.production_notes: EQ out the low-mid boxiness around 400Hz. Layer with a clap for extra width. Tune reverb tail under 0.4s for modern trap sound.

sounds.title: Vintage Open Hi-Hat
sounds.description: Classic vintage open hi-hat with warm metallic wash. Sampled from a late-70s Ludwig kit.
sounds.production_notes: Use automation to choke the tail. Works well pitched up slightly (+2–4 cents) for a tighter vintage feel. Blend with a sub-resonant closed hat.

sounds.title: Boom Bap Loop 90 BPM
sounds.description: Classic boom bap breakbeat loop at 90 BPM. 4-bar pattern with ghost notes and natural swing.
sounds.production_notes: Slice for individual hits or use the full loop. Add vinyl crackle for old-school texture. Chop into halftime by doubling tempo on the grid.

sounds.title: Moog Sub Bass Riff Fm
sounds.description: Warm Moog-style sub bass melodic riff in F minor. 2-bar phrase at 140 BPM. Great for UK drill and dark trap.
sounds.production_notes: High-pass at 40Hz to remove rumble before layering with 808. Automate filter cutoff for movement. Works well with parallel compression.

sounds.title: Piano Chop Loop Am
sounds.description: Chopped and pitched soul-piano sample loop in A minor at 95 BPM. Dusty, warm, with subtle reverb.
sounds.production_notes: Trim attack on the chops. Use MPC-style swing at 55–58%. Low-pass at 8kHz for a muted vintage tone. Pairs well with drum loop 'Boom Bap Loop 90 BPM' (pitch-stretch).

sounds.title: Supersawtooth Pad Loop Gm
sounds.description: Wide detuned supersawtooth pad with slow filter automation. 8-bar loop in G minor at 128 BPM.
sounds.production_notes: High-pass at 200Hz to leave sub space. Use a subtle chorus on top. Great as a build-up riser when automated up an octave over 8 bars.

sounds.title: Female Vocal Chop Dm
sounds.description: Short punchy female vocal chop in D minor at 120 BPM. 1-bar phrase, tuned and ready.
sounds.production_notes: Tune each chop individually. Stack thirds for harmonies. Use a short plate reverb to glue. Layer with a pitched synth for a full melodic element.

sounds.title: Massive Dark Pluck
sounds.description: Native Instruments Massive X preset — dark pluck with fast attack and sharp filter. Ideal for trap and dark melodic productions.
sounds.production_notes: Load in Massive X. Tune oscillator unison to 5 voices, detune 15%. Assign mod wheel to filter resonance for live performance variation.

sounds.title: Serum Hoover Lead
sounds.description: Xfer Serum preset — classic hoover-style lead with aggressive distortion and wide stereo field. Inspired by early-90s rave.
sounds.production_notes: Stack with a sub-octave version for thickness. Use OTT multiband compression at 40–50% mix. Automate pitch bend for classic hoover swoops.

sounds.title: Trap Kit Vol.1
sounds.description: Full trap drum kit: 5 kicks, 4 snares, 8 hi-hats (open & closed), 3 claps, 2 percs, 1 808 tail. All 24-bit WAV.
sounds.production_notes: Use the 808 tail with volume automation for melodic 808 slides. Pair kicks with parallel compression chain on a drum bus. All files are gain-staged at -6 dBFS peak.

sounds.title: Lo-Fi Vinyl Drum Kit
sounds.description: Vintage lo-fi drum kit sampled from vinyl records. Includes heavy vinyl saturation and natural room sound. 12 unique hits.
sounds.production_notes: Do NOT over-compress — the natural dynamics are part of the character. Add a vinyl crackle layer beneath. Works beautifully with the Piano Chop Loop Am.

sounds.title: Rhodes Mark II — Full Range
sounds.description: Multi-sampled Rhodes Mark II electric piano. 4 velocity layers, full 88-note range. Warm, woody attack with characteristic bark.
sounds.production_notes: Velocity layers: 0–40 soft, 41–80 medium, 81–100 hard, 101–127 hard-bite. Load into Kontakt or your sampler. Tune slightly sharp (+8 cents) for vintage detuned character.

sounds.title: Upright Bass — Pizzicato
sounds.description: Studio-recorded upright bass, pizzicato technique. 3 velocity layers, E1–G3. Rich low-end with finger noise at top velocity.
sounds.production_notes: Use a high-pass at 50Hz to prevent muddiness. Subtle compression: 4:1, 5ms attack, 80ms release. Blend DI and room mic for more depth.

sounds.title: Dark Trap Production Bundle
sounds.description: Everything needed to build a complete dark trap track: kicks, 808s, snares, melodic loops, and preset patches. 150+ files.
sounds.production_notes: Start with the 808 and melody loop, build drums around them. All loops are key-tagged — match keys before mixing melodic elements.

sounds.title: Lo-Fi Hip Hop Essentials
sounds.description: Warm, dusty lo-fi hip hop collection: vinyl drum kits, piano chops, jazz bass lines, and ambient textures. 80+ files.
sounds.production_notes: Apply subtle bitcrushing (12–14 bit) and add tape saturation. Use Izotope Vinyl or RC-20 for that authentic lo-fi texture. Keep tempos between 70–90 BPM.

sounds.title: Reference: Drake — Scary Hours
sounds.description: Commercial mix reference for dark trap production. Note the 808 placement, vocal chain, and spatial treatment.
sounds.production_notes: Key observations: 808 saturated heavily, centered in mix. Snare has a wide reverb tail that contrasts the dry kick. Vocal has a short pre-delay (~12ms) before room reverb. Low-end rolls off below 45Hz on the mix bus.

sounds.title: Reference: J Dilla — Donuts
sounds.description: Production reference from J Dilla's Donuts. Study the chop technique, sample layering, and intentional vinyl grit.
sounds.production_notes: The magic is in the imperfect timing — do NOT quantize to grid. Let the chops breathe off-beat by 1–4 ms. Saturation is extreme but intentional. Layer two drum breaks slightly out of phase for phase-cancellation texture.

sounds.title: Shaker 16th Pattern
sounds.description: Studio shaker playing a 16th note pattern at a neutral tempo. Clean stereo recording, gentle high-frequency sparkle.
sounds.production_notes: Pan slightly off-centre for width. Cut 2kHz to reduce harshness. Works well doubled and panned L/R for a stereo shaker bed.

sounds.title: Reverse Crash Riser
sounds.description: Reverse crash cymbal riser, 4 bars, classic transition effect. Builds naturally from silence to a full crash hit at the end.
sounds.production_notes: Place exactly 4 bars before a drop. Add a high-pass sweep automation rising from 200Hz to full over the riser duration. Layer with a white noise riser for extra intensity.
